is_value.description: Tests the value of one or more counters.
is_value.name: Counter value

decrement.description: Decrements a counter by its step size.
decrement.name: Decrement counter

increment.description: Increments a counter by its step size.
increment.name: Increment counter

reset.description: Resets a counter to its initial value.
reset.name: Reset counter

set_value.description: Sets a counter to a specific value.

value.description: The new counter value the entity should be set to.
value.name: Value

set_value.name: Set counter value

decremented.description: Triggers after one or more counters decrement.
decremented.name: Counter decremented

incremented.description: Triggers after one or more counters increment.
incremented.name: Counter incremented

maximum_reached.description: Triggers after one or more counters reach their maximum value.
maximum_reached.name: Counter reached maximum

minimum_reached.description: Triggers after one or more counters reach their minimum value.
minimum_reached.name: Counter reached minimum

reset.description: Triggers after one or more counters are reset.
reset.name: Counter reset
